calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73292885 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73292885 --event evt-petition-disposition; rg --files data/cases/scotus/73292885 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg --files -uu data/cases/scotus/73292885 | sort; rg --files -uu | rg '(^|/)record/(context\\.json|documents\\.json|documents/)|73292885.*snapshot|snapshot.*73292885' | sort | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73292885/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73292885/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json data/cases/scotus/73292885/record/context.json data/cases/scotus/73292885/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73292885/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73292885/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73292885/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt; sed -n '1,240p' data

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,1490p' data/cases/scotus/73292885/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n '^(STATEMENT|REASONS|I\\.|II\\.|III\\.|IV\\.|Appendix B|Appendix C|CONCLUSION|[0-9]+a$)|Court of Appeals|unpreserved|preserv|waiv|declin|affirm|jurisdiction|due process|firearm|coercive' data/cases/scotus/73292885/record/documents/petition.txt | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '291,760p' data/cases/scotus/73292885/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n '^#|Modern discretionary-cert|salience|relist|CVSG|originating circuit|fee class|Term' metrics/statpack.md | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,175p' metrics/statpack.md; jq '.scotus_cert_terms // .cert_terms // keys' metrics/statpack.json 2>/dev/null | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.terms | type, .[0], .[-1]' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.sections | keys' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq -r '.sections[] | [.title // .name // \"\", (.scope // \"\")] | @tsv' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.sections[] | select((.title // .name // \"\") | test(\"salience|Salience\"))' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)
const xs = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|docket|opinion|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(xs);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", case_name:"United States v. Emerson", num_results:3, fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","absolute_url","court","syllabus","procedural_history","posture","opinions"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"clusters", item_id:25545, fields:["id","case_name","date_filed","citations","docket","sub_opinions","syllabus","procedural_history","posture"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", q:"\"922(g)(8)\" \"bill of attainder\"", num_results:3, fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","absolute_url","court","opinions"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --limit 10","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)
